summary: Adds release source arrays to JSON metadata, agent-focused onboard fields, and per-series citation footers for multi-series obs output.
highlights: release get and meta release JSON now include full associated sources[] arrays
Series metadata now supports multi-source citation text with source_names
obs latest and multi-series obs get now print Sources by series footer blocks for unambiguous attribution
Single-series citations keep concise Source:/Sources: output
Citation display names are normalized when upstream source tags are all lowercase
Onboard JSON now includes primary_audience, intended_for_humans, and content_type=agent_onboarding
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
